# rateCurveType

**Instance Property**

A rate of change for the setting’s playback speed.

## Declaration

```swift
var rateCurveType: PHASECurveType { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEGroupPresetSetting/init(gain:rate:gainCurveType:rateCurveType:)] parameter.

## Setting Playback Speed

- **rate**: The playback speed for audio.
title: rateCurveType
